In the Bengal polls, where BJP strives to wrest power from three-time chief minister Mamata Banerjee, who fiercely opposes the UCC, the issue is expected to highly polarise the elections.

The first half is noted for its entertainment value and the performances of Pradeep Ranganathan and Krithi Shetty. Anirudh Ravichander's music is also a highlight.

This powerful AI can find software vulnerabilities, raising cybersecurity concerns for the financial system. Anthropic launched Project Glasswing to proactively fix flaws before attackers exploit them.

title: ‘Did nothing wrong’: Threat backlash forces Shreyas' sister to delete viral video
description: Shresta Iyer, sister of India cricketer Shreyas Iyer, removed a viral social media video after receiving threats. She stated her "light-hearted banter" about a washed-out match between PBKS and KKR was misunderstood. Despite clarifying her intent was supportive and not hateful, she deleted the clip to prevent negativity and urged for kindness.

title: Cash recovery row: Justice Yashwant Varma resigns amid impeachment process
description: Justice Yashwant Varma has resigned from his post following a cash recovery controversy and impeachment proceedings. Allegations of unaccounted cash surfaced after a fire at his residence, prompting a Supreme Court inquiry and subsequent parliamentary action. The judge had previously questioned the constitutionality of the inquiry process.

description: Uttar Pradesh's voter count has surpassed 13 crore following the Special Intensive Revision Programme-2026. Over 17 lakh new voters aged 18 and above were added.
